message:
fix: route mail/delivery ops to correct beadsDir by bead ID prefix

Mailbox and delivery operations used a fixed beadsDir without validating
the bead ID prefix matched the target database. Added ResolveBeadsDirForID
to resolve the correct .beads directory from routes.jsonl.

Cherry-picked from PR #2522.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
